posts.author: hemanth (Hemanth)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

When will we get the option to filter by SubItems ?

In the below topic, it was confirmed by @Dani that this feature is in roadmap of Q4, 2021. Still, the feature is not available.

Filter by subitems status columns Platform discussions
Hello guys, In a board I have items with subitems. These subitems have got few status columns. Is there a way to filter the board based on the status column of the subitems ? For exemple: [image] I want to filter my board to display only subitems where column 3 = ‘Working on it’

It doesn’t make sense to use Subitems without the filter feature. Please understand and help.
